channel.title: Homeland Season Alerts
channel.description: New season notifications for Homeland from TVmaze metadata.

item.title: Season 8 — Premieres 2020-02-09
item.description: Premiere: 2020-02-09 | Finale: 2020-04-26 | Episodes: 12 | Network: Paramount+ with Showtime
